 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}

 COMMENT=	Unit conversion and calculation
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--program-prefix=g
